subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Lines are but tracings and symbols, signs that indicate words and expressions, and this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی خطوط نقوش است و علائم و اشارات داله بر الفاظ و کلمات و این
subcodes.subjects: @grammar and orthography, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God
